flow_model_policy: Use relative Pacuare flow bands only until rainfall/stage/discharge sources and guide feedback are tied to station ids and dates.

needed_evidence: recent rainfall deficit or dry-season pattern
visible shallow shelves and exposed rock behavior
storm or antecedent rainfall pattern that produces commercial runnable flow
guide-reviewed hole, wave-train, lateral, and eddy-line behavior
swimmer recovery visibility and eddy accessibility
washout thresholds for holes and sticky hydraulics

candidate_sources.target_use: official rainfall, weather, and station context
hydrometeorological context if public station data is available

next_actions: Record candidate rainfall/stage/discharge station ids and basin relation.
Build a dry/runnable/high/flash rain-fed decision table after station metadata is reviewed.
Ask guide reviewers to mark flow-specific hydraulic behavior and rescue implications before numeric tuning.
